product_name: CZI C30N Smart Dual-Light Night Vision Gimbal Camera
thermal_detector: Uncooled vanadium oxide (VOx) infrared focal plane detector
weight_note: Spec listed as <=1500g; multiple retailers list 1510g (3.32 lbs +/-10g)
power_consumption_note: Not publicly listed; powered via DJI Matrice SkyPort interface
voltage_input_note: Powered through DJI Matrice SkyPort; voltage not independently specified
stabilization_range_roll_note: Not publicly specified; 3-axis stabilized with +/-0.01 degree jitter
output_interface: DJI SkyPort (integrated with DJI Matrice payload interface)
control_protocol: DJI PSDK / DJI Pilot 2 / CZI Pilot app
ip_rating_note: Not publicly specified in available sources
price_source: Adorama (sale price, reduced from $25,999 MSRP); other retailers ~$18,999-$25,999
price_note: Prices vary significantly by retailer; MSRP appears to be $25,999
availability: In stock at multiple US retailers (Adorama, B&H, Amazon, DroneNerds, eBay, heliguy, etc.)
notable_features: Starlight-level night vision with 1/1.8" sensor and f/1.6 aperture
850nm IR spotlight for active illumination (2W+, 3-degree beam)
1280x1024 uncooled VOx thermal imaging with 55mm telephoto thermal lens
21 TOPS AI computing power for on-board analytics
DJI PSDK compatible with Matrice 300/350 RTK
near_miss_reason: Fails both weight (1500g vs 1000g limit) and price ($15,999-$25,999 vs $10,000 limit) criteria significantly
data_confidence: High for imaging specs; moderate for price (varies by retailer); some electrical specs unavailable
